hotel_name: Maidi Homestay Mũi Né (Maidi Homestay Mui Ne)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: felt like a deceptive bait-and-switch tactic, where customers are drawn in by affordable rates, only to be forced into paying much higher prices upon arrival. I had no prior notice of any room unavailability, and the confirmed booking should have guaranteed the room I reserved
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: This has to be the most unprofessional group of people I have ever experienced in 65 years of travel.
reviews.negatives: There was absolutely nothing to like about this place. The most disrespectful people one could imagine. Avoid this place at all costs.

reviews.title: Don't trust what you see on web.
reviews.text: This hotel is definetly not a 4.5 stars. Maximum 2. Old and not well maintained. Don’t trust the pics. The kitchen is a 1 star kitchen, really basic. The woman manager is a ghost (never there) but a shark, moneymaker. Fortunatly the old man is kind and super gentle (a very nice man!) but doesn’t speak a English or French word. No beach around or you have to pay at a restaurant to see a 1 meter square beach. A lot of noise and no good insulation. Go at your own risk.
reviews.room_type: Family Room -- 2 Bed

reviews.title: The staff was friendly and helpful and the room was beautiful and comfortable but as a traveller who prioritizes locatio
reviews.positives: Beautiful room with spacious bed and nice spa bath.
reviews.negatives: Prior to arriving on the property, we were under the impression that the beach was 50m from the location. Upon arrival, we were quite disappointed. Not only is the property on a busy and loud street, but a beach where you can swim and hang out on is no where in sight. Most of the beachfront in this area is privatized and if not, it’s filled with trash. We also thought there would be bicycles included, which they are not.

reviews.title: Self service homestay
reviews.text: I didn’t mind no tv and no refrigerator in the room, and I didn’t mind that the place was rundown and there was no elevator. The problem was there was no customer service. There was no help with our luggages to our rooms which was on the third floor. The plumbing in the bathroom was terrible. The sink was not working, the water pressure for the shower was very low, and the toilet sometimes worked. I told the staff three times, but nothing was fit during our full week stay. They cleaned the room and gave us new towels only one time during our stay. There were plenty of ants in the room also. Staff tried to rent us very damaged and unsafe motorbikes. I’m not sure how they got high reviews. Simply bad business that ruins holiday.
reviews.response: Maidi sincerely apologizes for any inconvenience you may have experienced. Thank you for your honest feedback; we will strive to improve and look forward to welcoming you on your next trip with even better service!
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Mui Ne solo female traveler
reviews.positives: Location is amazing. Walking distance to cafes  restaurants and seafood spots. Walking distance to many motorbike rentals.
reviews.negatives: The pictures and room descriptions aren't as accurate as they should be. I was expecting a mini fridge but there was none

reviews.title: Room was unavailable when i arrived
reviews.text: I had booked a room weeks before i had to arrive. They said room has water pipe issue although the room was given to someone else. I was shifted in another room.
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The homestay is at a good location. The staff is somehow nice and helpful, but not professional.
reviews.negatives:
- The bed is very uncomfortable.
- The bathtub was broken. Water pressure is very low and unstable.
- The room is not clean.

reviews.title: Not what i expected
reviews.text: Room furniture feels very dated with no TV (i do get the concept of rustic and this is not it), lighting is absolute trash with tube light and a very annoying glow of yellow (compared to downlight) there are rust on the faucet, for the price there are better place in the area, the image provided are accurate in some perspective but very disapointed when checking it in detail. Sorry!
reviews.room_type: Family Room -- 2 Bed

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The room itself is new and cozy. Location is good near restaurants and with scooter close to Mui Ne and the tourist attractions.
reviews.negatives: The description of the booking mentioned free bikes, but there were none. To resolve this, we were lent a scooter bike during our stay. Although the appartment is 50 meters away from the shore, there is no beach close. Staff could not speak any English, but was helpful by using translating apps.

reviews.title: Not worth the money
reviews.text:
Pros: The place does have a sea view, and the staff were friendly.

Cons: The accommodation is overpriced for what it offers. There was no TV, no fridge, and not even a kettle. The faucet at the sink had very low water pressure. The house is old, and the furniture is deteriorating with a musty smell. The bathtub in the room was leaking, causing water to spread across the floor.
Although there was a balcony with a table and chairs placed right in front of the room, it wasn’t private at all. Guests from other rooms would regularly sit there, making it noisy and uncomfortable. As a result, I couldn’t open the window or draw the curtains comfortably.
Overall, it didn’t match the price paid and was not good value for money.
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Clean, comfortable and friendly staff

reviews.title: Not the best
reviews.text: The place itself was nice but the sheets had stains on. A good location near some nice restaurants, however the place was let down by the staff who weren’t very friendly.
reviews.room_type: Standard Sea View Room for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: What an amazing place to stay! Stuff was kind and helpful, room was spotless, and the view is a top notch! Hope to come back again to enjoy.

reviews.title: my stay Maidi. H
reviews.text:
NOT A BAD SPOT FOR THE PRICE,
WE STAY IN ROOM BESIDE RECEPTION AND THE NIGHT CLERK PLAYED HIS PHNE VERY LOUD, I ASK HIM TO TURN DOWN, I THINK DEAF,
reviews.room_type: Triple Room - Special Offer

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
El hotel está recien reformado, todo está nuevo y super moderno
Está lejos del centro de Mui ne, de las playas y de las dunas
Se necesita una moto o un taxi para moverse
Aún que tambien esa zona tiene todos los servicios cerca
reviews.negatives:
El hotel todavia no habia terminado las obras, el primer dia me despertó el taladro a las 8 de la mañana
En el bar todavia no hay servicio de nada por lo que he visto.
Deberían cambiar el espejo del baño ya que parece el del circo que te deforma la cara.

reviews.title: 가성비 최고
reviews.text: 혼행자로 가성비,가심비 최고인 숙소로 초천합니다.
reviews.room_type: Standard Sea View Room for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
La localisation  est  assez bonne et le jardin devant la maison est isolant.et beau.
Vue sur la mer au dernier etage..
reviews.negatives:
Pas assez d'équipement ,pas de bouilloire  ni de frigo ...
Les jeunes qui tiennent  cet établissement  ne sont pas très,motivés  ou démarrent  ce travail.

reviews.title: Decent stay
reviews.text: Good budget hotel if you like the quiet.
reviews.room_type: Triple Room - Special Offer

reviews.title: Mui Ne
reviews.positives: Bord de mer accessible à pied ; belle plage de sable blanc. Restauration très variée du street food au restaurant proposant diverses cuisine s. On peut même déguster une raclette suisse ... mais je recommande les fruits de mer très accessibles.
reviews.negatives:
La route principale bruyante ; ce sont les rois du klaxon...
Karaoke tous les samedis soir

reviews.title: Beautiful view, affordable price.
reviews.text:
The room on the top floor has a nice sea view, it is clean, with basic furnishings, and the price is very reasonable for budget couples and families.  
Disadvantages: The homestay sign is quite small and obscured, making it hard to find. The bathroom had drainage issues and a sewer smell, but it was addressed immediately after reporting it to the staff.
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Bon séjour mais la plage est complètement privatisée.
reviews.positives: Le charme de l’authentique

reviews.title: Cheap room and nice Location, too noisy and a little dusty
reviews.text: The room it self was cute but quite tiny for tripple room. got everthing we need but I got quite allergy might cus the dust also thin walls made us can hear people speaking outside and in other rooms.
reviews.room_type: Classic Room

reviews.title: Superbe
reviews.positives: Le personnel incroyable. La propreté l’emplacement et le confort
reviews.negatives: Bruit des vagues le soir mais aussi bruit des voitures

reviews.title: Great staff.  Good location, Lots of good restaurants nearby.
reviews.text: The only negative I will mention is the bed was incredibly uncomfortable.  Everything else was adequate.  Staff were amazing.
reviews.room_type: Standard Garden View Room

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: L’emplacement, la chambre et la propreté du lieu. La possibilité de louer des scooters sur place.
reviews.negatives: Le service de lingerie: notre lessive nous est revenue pas propre et sentait mauvais.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: A memorable experience at Maidi as well as in Phan Thiet =)))) I rode my bike down to Mui Ke Ga alone and had a breakdown on the way. I called the owner of the homestay and he said to wait there, he would come pick both the bike and me up. But luckily, I met two kind guys who helped push my bike to the repair shop. After checking out, the owner asked me a lot of questions and chatted with me, refunded my money, and gave me a free bike rental. It was amazing for a trip!!!
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Séjour rapide avec accueil chaleureux. Location de scooter sur place. Impeccable
reviews.positives: L hospitalité
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Good for 1 night only
reviews.text:
We stayed in the large room on the first floor, above the lobby. It was a spacious clean room, but the smell in the room and the washroom was awful. We used a whole bottle of deodorizer in the 3 nights we stayed there.

Lots of restaurants around. The beach with kite surfing is about a 30 min walk away.
reviews.room_type: Standard Sea View Room for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Atmosphäre war toll
Personal war sehr freundlich 
Schöne Zimmer
reviews.negatives: Internet war nicht so gut

reviews.title: Clean accommodation in a good location.
reviews.text: The massage shop and restaurant are conveniently located in Bogeogeuri. I stayed in a sea view room for two, which was spacious and clean. The water pressure was low, and a shower filter seemed necessary. Personal bathing items are also essential. There is some road noise since it is on the street, but it might not matter to those who are not sensitive to it. I had trouble sleeping. T_T I do not recommend it for solo female travelers. When I went, it was the off-season, so there were very few people around, and the security mechanism had only one handle, which felt unsafe. It was very clean and nice with no bugs at all, but there were many aspects that didn't suit me, so I was disappointed.
reviews.response: 마이디 홈스테이가 여러분을 환영합니다.  최근 좋지 않은 경험을 하신 점 진심으로 사과드리며, 귀하의 기여에 진심으로 감사드리며 개선해 나가겠습니다.  위에서 언급하지 않은 정말 나쁜 경험을 우리에게 제공하고 싶습니까?
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Sehr schöne und sauber Zimmer.
reviews.negatives: Nachts war es etwas laut von der Straße. Der Host konnte kein Englisch.

reviews.title: Decent in the price range.
reviews.text: I arrived at 12:30 PM, and the staff let me check in right away since they had a free room, no need to wait until 2 PM, which is a plus. The staff, while not overly enthusiastic, were very pleasant, and they were supportive of my family's needs. However, they weren't very knowledgeable about good places to eat. Additionally, the homestay is right next to Mr. Crab 2, a café that has a nice space for dining, so there's no need to go far. The beach where you can swim is about 4 km away; I can rent a bike to ride there conveniently for swimming.
reviews.response: maidi homestay chân thành cảm ơn tình cảm quý khách đã giành cho home, chúng tôi sẽ tiếp tục hoàn thiện hơn, mong được gặp lại quý khách trong những chuyến đi tiếp theo 💌.
reviews.room_type: Family Room -- 2 Bed

reviews.title: Top Übernachtung
reviews.positives: Sehr groß,sauber und für den Preis einfach zum weiterempfehlen +++
reviews.negatives: War alles inordnung

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: Close to the beach and convenient

reviews.title: Exceptional

Die Hosts waren super nett und hilfsbereit auch beim buchen von Touren.
Das Zimmer war sehr sauber und geräumig, würde jederzeit wieder kommen :)

reviews.title: Suitable for group travel.
reviews.text: The location is close to many entertainment spots, the accommodation is not too luxurious but adequately clean.
reviews.room_type: Royal Opera Suite

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
La posizione è molto invitante essendo a circa 150 metri dal mare.
Ma personalmente non c'è possibilità di spiaggia vicino, visto che lo spiazzo che propongono è interamente di asfalto.
reviews.negatives:
Il fatto che la reception non sappia parlare bene inglese e la comunicazione è scarsa.
È molto importante per noi persone straniere saper comunicare con qualcuno che ci possa comprendere.
I ragazzi hanno fatto il possibile per capirmi, ma è fondamentale saper la lingua inglese.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: I had a very good experience at Maidi homestay. I had a private room with my own bathroom. There was no pressure on the water but everything else was fine. The staff was very nice and helpful, and I rented a scooter for a day.
reviews.room_type: Standard Garden View Room

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Prima voor een paar nachten.
reviews.negatives: Ligt wel aan de weg dus wat gehorig. Wij hadden niet de kamer zoals op de foto. Geen bad en bureau

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The homestay is located on NDC Street, across from the Bon Bon, Nam Y, CASA restaurants, and coconut ice cream 68. Nearby, there is a large spa and several small bars, offering many dining and entertainment options. The homestay owner is cheerful, attentive, and friendly. The room has a moderate size; it is not small, but the sound insulation is poor. The restroom facilities are usable but a bit old. Motorbike rentals are available for freedom to explore. The accommodation fee is low, suitable for those who love to travel and only need a place to rest at night.
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: 最高！
reviews.positives: 部屋が綺麗でバルコニーからの景色が良かった。またスタッフも親切で、手配してくれたジープツアーもとても良かった。お湯シャワーも使用でき、徒歩圏内に飲食店多数あるので食事にも困らなかった。またムイネーに行くときは泊まりたいです！

reviews.title: The location of the accommodation is good.
reviews.text: The accommodation is located in the middle of Mui Ne Beach, with good surrounding infrastructure, and I had a comfortable stay. The sunrise viewed from the third floor is especially beautiful.
reviews.room_type: Family Room -- 2 Bed

reviews.negatives: 衛浴設備要改善,例如蓮蓬頭要更換.

reviews.title: Phòng rộng, khá vintage, ảnh chủ thân thiện, nhiệt tình. Nếu quay lại chắc chắn sẽ ở đây
reviews.text: Recommend
reviews.room_type: Standard Sea View Room for 2 Adults

reviews.title: 무이네 숙소 강추
reviews.positives:
우선 사장님  이랑 직원분들이 너무 친절하곶가격대비 가성비좋은 숙소입니다
위치도 너무좋아요 다음에 베트남 방문시 또  찾아오고 싶습니다
reviews.negatives: 없습니다

reviews.title: Nice view, has a bathtub.
reviews.text:
The bathroom doesn't have a threshold, and the shower water flows down and makes the bedroom floor wet. The homestay should have a threshold in the bathroom and provide additional mats in the bathtub area. 
There's no elevator, so anyone carrying heavy items will have to manage. 
On the last morning before checkout, there was a power outage, and after returning from the beach, the water pressure was very weak; I was worried there wouldn't be enough water to shower. At that time, it was close to checkout, and I was afraid of being late. When I reported it to the front desk, they couldn't provide any further assistance. I had to pack my things for hours without power, which was really frustrating. 
Everything else was fine; the view was beautiful, there was a big bathtub, and a chair on the balcony to enjoy the sea. There was free parking, but it seemed that someone was monitoring it; probably because there's no crime in this area.
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
位置不错，就在海边。离口碑很好的一家海鲜大排档很近，晚上吃饭方便。
住宿可以提供摩托车租赁服务。
reviews.negatives: 洗澡水晚上用时温度还是挺高的，早上水温偏凉，不过天气热也可以洗。

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 主人很好，我们两点坐车，主人给我们延迟退房。房间很大，有阳台晾晒衣服。还给我们点了香薰，味道很好！

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great place
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Thái độ cực tệ, thiếu văn hoá với khách hàng
reviews.positives:
Thái độ cực tệ, thiếu văn hoá. Mình có đặt phòng, nhưng vì lý do bất khả kháng, lịch trình bị thay đổi, mình chưa thể gọi huỷ ngày hôm đó, thì tối hôm đó mình nhận được 1 cuộc gọi từ homestay xác nhận huỷ, và sau đó là các tin nhắn như hình. Mình vẫn có thể chấp nhận huỷ tính phí, nhưng thái độ của Maidi homstay là không chấp nhận được.
Những khách hàng muốn được tôn trọng, có trải nghiệm tốt thì vẫn còn nhiều lựa chọn khác ở Phan Thiết.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The owner is very enthusiastic, when I rented it, I saw that the owner had a basket of delicious clams, so I went down to share, and the owner generously gave me a pot of seafood as well. 😘😘
reviews.room_type: Standard Sea View Room for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Tệ
reviews.positives: Vị trí mặt tiền, đậu xe dễ
reviews.negatives: Không có nước nóng, cảm thấy bẩn, cũ!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: View ổn
reviews.negatives:
Nhân viên thái độ như không cần khách, không friendly, luôn luôn cắm mặt vào điện thoại, đến nhận phòng mà anh nhân viên xăm trổ mà làm như đang trong công an phường vậy :D nói chung là không hề thoải mái, phòng bình thường, giá cao nhờ view đẹp, nhưng không hiểu sao mình vào thì lại ngứa khi nằm trên giường, ra ngoài thì lại hết, anh chủ thì nhiệt tình nhưng nhân viên thì ngược lại, nên mình nghĩ mình



 sẽ không bao giờ quay lại đây nữa.

reviews.title: Great

This was a nice place which is centrally located, loads of restaurants within metres. 
The staff were so helpful, assisting me with extended scooter hire and also a lost bank card. 
Highly recommend

reviews.title: A good place to stay
reviews.text: Friendly and helpful host, good location, reasonable price

reviews.title: Giá rẻ, chất lượng nơi nghỉ đủ dùng
reviews.positives:
Chủ nơi nghỉ nhiệt tình, thoải mái.
Ở đây không có bãi đậu ô tô riêng. Nhưng khi khách có ô tô, chủ Homestay vẫn linh động đi mượn chỗ để xe ô tô tại quán nhậu đối diện (quán này ăn cũng ngon, thực phẩm tươi sống nói chung tối đến, mọi người muốn ăn gia đình thì qua đây ăn tối thì chuẩn bài, đỡ phải đi kiếm đâu xa). Quán nhậu đối diện cũng rất nhiệt tình và vui vẻ khi có khách để xe.
Homestay không có dịch vụ thuê xe máy, nhưng khi khách hỏi thì chủ homstay đưa xe cho khách đi dạo đêm mà không lấy phí. 100 điểm cho sự dễ tính.
reviews.negatives: Trước homstay là các quán ăn, nhà hàng nên sẽ không có lối xuống biển để tắm. Người dân chỉ điểm thì cách Homstay 100m sẽ có chỗ tắm nhưng rất gồ ghề, lúc tắm sẽ nguy hiểm vả lại không có chỗ cho chị em chụp hình. Nếu muốn tắm, an toàn, sạch sẽ thì lên Google tìm bãi tắm Hàm Tiến, Cách homstay 1-2km. Tại đây có là bãi công cộng, có tắm nước ngọt, sạch sẽ,...

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Loved my stay!
reviews.room_type: Standard Sea View Room for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nhân viên nhiệt tình, hỗ trợ nâng hạng phòng khi trống phòng. Phòng đầy đủ tiện nghi, có bồn tắm và view nhìn ra biển. Home chú ý đến trải nghiệm của khách, lúc vừa nhận phòng được set up tinh dầu sả thơm nhẹ vô cùng dễ chịu. Được support mang theo thú cưng.
reviews.negatives: Hàng xóm hát kara và cách âm giữa các phòng chưa tốt lắm :(((

reviews.text: The room we booked was clean and wide. The location is also ideal. The staff in the reception is kind and helpful.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives:

- Phòng rất rộng

- Phòng trang trí rất xinh
reviews.negatives:
- Máy sấy tóc khá yếu
- Vị trí gần biển,cách biển 50m,có thể đi ra ngắm cảnh. Còn bãi tắm được cách homestay khoảng 3km. Nếu bạn có xe máy thì không sao cả,đi xe tầm 3 phút thôi.

reviews.title: Ok mais…
reviews.text:
L’hôtel n’est pas du tout à Mui Ne mais entre Banh Thiet et Mui Ne. 
Les belles plages ne sont pas là, d’ailleurs on ne peut pas se baigner en face de l’hôtel. Les dunes blanches et rouges sont à 30km.. 
Grande chambre agréable mais lit peu confortable. Quand je suis arrivée il y avait de l’eau partout parterre dans la salle de bain. Difficile de me laver les cheveux car pas bcp de pression ni d’eau chaude..  Dans l’ensemble ça va mais peut mieux faire.

reviews.title: Excellent value for money in good location
reviews.text: We've enjoyed our stay in this part of Mui Ne and felt comfortable at Maidi homestay. Though there is not really an access to the beach (not so different from other parts of the town) the view is beautiful and there are a lot of restaurants and facilities around; also small vietnamese street kitchens, which we prefer to the tourist places. The place could use some maintanance, but for the price there is nothing to complain and all the staff was very kind and helpful.

reviews.negatives: Отель очень старый, хотя чисто. Море рядом, а что толку если пляж у черта на куличках.

reviews.title: 对中国人很不友好。
reviews.text:
12点到达酒店，其实房间空出来了，但是房东不安排让我等，把欧美，韩国日本都安排完了，后来又来了两对欧洲人，竟然也在我前面安排。等到2点才安排我，等了两小时，最后一个安排到一楼马路边的一间房间，我当时急着出去，等太久，没注意。
等我看完红沙丘白沙滩和仙女溪回来一看房间怎么跟我之前定的不同。然后找房东找不到，发消息不回。题外话美奈，以为很美真无奈。租了24小时的摩托车3小时我就还了，越南人真的会营销，还一半是海水一半是火焰，前面一行字，后面全靠想象。
最后到了晚上发现四面墙，两面是玻璃用布一遮，白天没发现，晚上亮堂堂，也不隔音。另外一年墙不知道是啥人住放了一晚上欧美摇滚加乡村，最后排墙才稍微好点，最后一面墙好像是靠房东自己家，大人和小孩练英语练到十一二点，完全不顾别人，很大声说话。
然后Wifi一会好一会断，十点之后就没了。
最夸张。这间房一晚上都能很清晰的听到马路上呼啸而过的摩托和卡车，大巴的各种噪音，我基本一晚上都没睡，当天跟房东发了很多消息，一条都没回。
reviews.room_type: Standard Garden View Room

reviews.title: Home tạm tạm. Nhân viên quá tệ
reviews.text: Phòng ở thì tạm tạm đi, nói chung cũng cũng ở mức tạm chấp nhận. Nhưng thái độ của bảo vệ và lễ tân rất kỳ cục, chuyện gì cũng kiểu nói lý cho mình trước, nói chung mình sử dụng dịch vụ, có trả tiền đầy đủ, mà đưa xe thì cà tàn, kêu đổi thì nói để gọi chỗ khác mang xe qua cho, xong không có hay không làm được cũng không báo, lúc hỏi thì nói là không đổi được, rồi còn kêu dùng chiếc xe tệ hơn. Sáng hôm sau có xe khác ok hơn, khi mà mình muốn đề nghị đổi thì kỳ kèo, rồi viện cớ này cớ kia, nói chung mình trả tiền chứ có đi xin mượn ai đâu mà sao thái độ quá. Đến hôm trả xe thì đòi tiền liền. Mình nói chuyển khoản thì bảo vệ không chịu, đòi lấy tiền mặt, mình không có tiền mặt thì ổng nói là đi đâu rút tiền rồi đưa. Mà đã trả xe rồi thì giờ đi bộ kiếm cây ATM à??? trong khi homestay có chuyển khoản mà? xong kỳ kèo một lúc ổng nói lát chuyển cô lễ tân. xong là tụi mình đi ăn sáng cf rồi quay lại để 12h check out. lúc về là thấy cô lễ tân là mình yêu cầu ck liền luôn, lúc này á, cổ kêu 2 ngày là 300k, mà mình hỏi sao chủ bảo là 140k/ngày là tổng 280k thôi mà. Xong cái bả nói là do tụi mình thuê xe sớm :)))) mà á, tụi mình lấy xe ngày đầu là gần 8h á vì chờ này chờ kia, rồi vậy là sớm dữ hen. mà á, ai đời mà nói vậy, thuê nguyên ngày thì tính cả ngày, lần đầu tiên mình thấy có một home như này và nhân viên thái độ như vậy. Nhất là ông bảo vệ cứ thái độ nói lý lẽ như dạy đời khách và còn kiểu lầm bầm "lương thì ít mà bắt làm này làm kia" Chủ home có thấy review này thì mình cải thiện dịch vụ ạ vì thái độ vậy làm khách mất vui.
reviews.response: Maidi chân thành cảm ơn những đóng góp mang tính chất xây dựng của quý khách! Chúng tôi sẽ đào tạo nhân viên thêm. Xin chân thành cảm ơn và hẹn gặp lại các bạn trong những chuyến đi tiếp theo với chất lượng dịch vụ trọn vẹn hơn!
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Все супер, однозначная рекомендация
reviews.positives: Все сууууупер! Очень милый персонал, очень внимательный, помогли реализовать все планы! Номер чистый, до пляжа недалеко на такси, пешком доходили за 35 минут, тоже ок!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Phòng quá hôi mùi cống, ko có tủ lạnh, ko đáng với giá tiền, nhân viên ko niềm nở với khách
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Супер, планирую вернуться на зиму и точно месяц-другой буду жить в этом отеле, максимально надежное место. Я трепетно от
reviews.positives:
Персонал очень приветливый, с заботой относится к посетителям. Мы приехали часа в два ночи, нам открыли (отель закрывается на ночь, как и большинство во Вьетнаме), проводили и зарегистрировали наутро
В номере ВООБЩЕ не было замечено никакой живности, тараканов или чего-то такого, нет клещей, даже гекконы к нам не забегали, это огромный плюс. Убирают раз в пару дней или по просьбе, с этим проблем нет. Опять же, персонал делает максимум для комфорта проживающих

Рядом огромное количество кафе и ресторанов
reviews.negatives:
В один из дней начали сверлить в 7 утра, что, конечно,очень помешало отдыху. Но это был единственный раз  за 14 дней в отеле. 

В номере нет шкафа или тумбы для вещей, (есть 1 рейл с пятью вешалками) нас было 2 человека и все это время все вещи лежали в чемоданах на полу номера, учитывая, что номер и так небольшой, это доставляло неудобства

reviews.title: Solo & love it
reviews.positives: Verandah & sitting area was directly outside my room with view onto to road comings & goings. Nice & quiet.
reviews.negatives:
Bed linen looked dodgy so I slept on my sleeping bag. There were tiny insects crawling on the bed. Bathroom was grubby & every time I turned on the shower I had to hose the centipede down the drain hole....it was back again next shower & down the drain it had to go again.
I'm not insect phobic....most of the time.....but they should remain outside.

Wouldn't recommend this place because it needs a good clean.
Tried to put up video of insects on bed but don't know why it didn't load.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
The room is beautiful and has character . The sitting area on the shared balcony was nice. 
I was disappointed because the pictures and discription said kettle , fridge even a hob but there was nothing . Not even a kettle . The young woman tried her best to understand me but no English made it difficult . We used translater but she didn't comprehend what I was saying because the description in B.Com was in English . 
For people who don't mind not having a kettle I'm sure they may like but please B.Com take out the description of room because it is deceiving
reviews.negatives: Didn't match B.Com description

reviews.title: Nice big room but smelt of drains
reviews.positives:
Good location with a lot of restaurants and bars nearby. If you get a bike it’s easy to drive further up the road to more places (you can rent a bike with a hotel).

The rooms were nice and big just like the pictures. The bathtub was good and had hot water (would have been good to get some bath gel with the room). You can get room service every day if you want and get bottled water. There’s a good balcony to sit outside.

Only negative was the bathroom smelt of drains and the room smelt when we came back at the end of the day.

The Mui Ne area in general is not very good value for money relative to other areas of Vietnam, but this place seems okay. If I had to pick a place to stay at in Mui Ne again, I would surely return here :)

Было много муравьёв маленьких,и расположен хостел возле дороги,поэтому ночью было немного шумно,а так в целом все отлично 👍🏻

reviews.title: Гестхаус с видом на море
reviews.text: Расположен рядом с улицей ресторанов с морепродуктами. Довольно аскетично, но выглядит все приятно. Понравилась панорама на море. Есть балкончик на этаже. Красивая зелёная территория. Подъем по лестнице (с вещами не самый лёгкий). В целом все ОК, особенно для короткого проживания
reviews.room_type: Master Ocean View Suite for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nothing wrong to say, it’s a beautiful place to stay and the staff is amazing and friendly too :)

reviews.title: Хороший семейный отель, но только для тех, кто не боится шума и света
reviews.text:
Плюсы:

· Очень душевная и домашняя атмосфера: чувствуется, что отель содержит семья
· Персонал вежливый, милый и гостеприимный
· Отличное расположение (судя по всему, в самом центре, прямо на главной улице)

Минусы / Важно учесть:

· Окна выходят на оживлённую магистраль. Даже в праздники движение активное, поэтому шумно круглосуточно.
· Стеклянные двери и окна создают эффект «аквариума» — с улицы проникает очень много света. Если вам нужна полная темнота для сна, это не ваш вариант.
· Хорошо засыпали только благодаря тому, что очень уставали за день.

Итог: Мы останавливались на две ночи, и это совпало с праздниками, что добавило шума. В целом отель приятный, по-домашнему уютный, с чуткими хозяевами. Но если для вас критичны полная тишина и светонепроницаемость, этот вариант лучше не рассматривать. Всем остальным — отличное место для коротких остановок, особенно когда у вас насыщенный день и «вырубаетесь» сразу.
reviews.room_type: Standard Sea View Room for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Clean, cosy stay next to everything you need :)
reviews.positives:
Comfortable bed, good working AC & fan, very clean, lovely view over the boulevard/street&sea, location is nice; restaurants close by/next door as well as shops/mini marts. 
They also have beer/drinks for a cheap price
reviews.negatives:
Staff speak (almost) no English. But google translate is very handy. 
For beach lovers; the sea is not really accessible, so I would recommend going to a resort in the street and make use of their pool for a small fee.
